<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get webhooks for a project"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/webhooks/{projectId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve all webhooks associated with a given project ID.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"API-SECRET","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"The secret API key for authentication."},{"name":"apiKey","in":"query","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"The public API key for authentication."},{"name":"projectId","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"The unique identifier of the project."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"List of all webhooks for the specified project.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"projectId":{"type":"string"},"webhookUrl":{"type":"string"},"eventType":{"type":"string"}},"title":"WebhookCreateRequest"}}}}},"403":{"description":"Access to the resource is forbidden.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"statusCode":{"type":"integer","example":403},"errorMessage":{"type":"string","example":"Forbidden resource"},"error":{"type":"string","example":"Forbidden"}}}}}}}}
